ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "recommendationid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the review */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the review */,
  "review" TEXT /* Content of the review */,
  "timestamp_created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "timestamp_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  "voted_up" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is voted up */,
  "votes_up" INTEGER /* Total number of upvotes the review received */,
  "votes_funny" INTEGER /* Total number of funny votes the review received */,
  "weighted_vote_score" REAL /* Weighted score based on votes */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the review */,
  "steam_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game was purchased on Steam */,
  "received_for_free" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game was received for free */,
  "written_during_early_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review was written during early access */,
  "hidden_in_steam_china" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is hidden in Steam China */,
  "steam_china_location" TEXT /* Location for Steam China */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being reviewed */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the review (1-5) */,
  "spoiler_tag" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  "helpful_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for a review to be considered helpful */,
  "has_screenshots" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review has attached screenshots */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendationid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "steam_id" TEXT /* Steam ID of the author */,
  "num_games_owned" INTEGER /* Total number of games owned by the author */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews written by the author */,
  "playtime_forever" INTEGER /* Total playtime of all games owned, in minutes */,
  "playtime_last_two_weeks" INTEGER /* Playtime in the last two weeks, in minutes */,
  "playtime_at_review" INTEGER /* Playtime at the time of writing the review, in minutes */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the author played a game */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the author */,
  "profile_created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author's profile was created */,
  "profile_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author's profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "recommendationid" INTEGER /* ID of the review the comment is associated with */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "timestamp_created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been edited */,
  "edited_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_recommendationid FOREIGN KEY ("recommendationid") REFERENCES reviews ("recommendationid")
)

CREATE TABLE "vote_logs" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote record */,
  "recommendationid" INTEGER /* ID of the review being voted on */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who cast the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., up, funny) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was cast */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the voter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_logs_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_logs_recommendationid FOREIGN KEY ("recommendationid") REFERENCES reviews ("recommendationid")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the game */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  "platforms" TEXT /* Platforms the game is available on */,
  "steam_store_url" TEXT /* URL of the game's Steam Store page */,
  "steam_store_id" TEXT /* ID of the game on the Steam Store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_tags_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_game_playtime" (
  "playtime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playtime record */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "playtime_forever" INTEGER /* Total playtime of the game by the author, in minutes */,
  "playtime_last_two_weeks" INTEGER /* Playtime of the game by the author in the last two weeks, in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playtime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_author_game_playtime_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_author_game_playtime_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)
